Chapter 2: Minimal Page

A compact second chapter used to verify multi-page navigation and shared layout behavior.

Document Information

Version
0.1.0
Last updated
2026-04-25
Author
Atsushi Suzuki

Purpose

This intentionally small chapter keeps the repository from maintaining two copies of the same demonstration content. Use Chapter 1 as the main component reference, and use this page as a second generated chapter for navigation checks.

This page is generated from a short fragment in chapters-src/02-examples.html and shares the same shell, CSS, and JavaScript as Chapter 1.

Minimal Components

Generated Page Check

The table of contents, sidebar links, and Previous navigation are generated or enhanced without duplicating the full template content.

python
print("Chapter 2 is intentionally small.")
Minimal generated chapter for multi-page workflow checks.
